name: Estrategia rentable para trading del US30
summary:
**Conversation Overview**

This conversation centered on the iterative development of an automated Expert Advisor (EA) for MetaTrader 5, progressing through multiple instruments and brokers. The person is a trader developing algorithmic trading systems, working primarily with US30 (Dow Jones) and NAS100 (NASDAQ) indices. The project evolved through nine versions (v1–v9) of a strategy called "Triple Gate," with each version targeting a specific diagnosed problem identified through backtest CSV analysis.

The core strategy uses five cascading filters: EMA alignment (EMA9>EMA21>EMA50), price above EMA200, MACD histogram momentum, Fair Value Gap (FVG) proximity, and a bullish confirmation candle. Later versions added three "gates": ADX≥35 (trend strength), H1 EMA50 regime filter (macro bullish environment), and ATR≤50 (volatility shock filter). All versions operate exclusively during the NY session, long-only, with SL×1.0 ATR and TP×1.5 ATR, no trailing stop, and no break-even — a critical discovery from v5 where trailing stops were cutting winners and destroying the R:R ratio.

A major discovery mid-project was that v8 and v9 backtests, believed to be on US30 (.US30Cash RoboForex), were actually run on NAS100 (.USTECHCash RoboForex). The NAS100 results were genuinely strong: 491 trades, WR 45.4%, PF 1.211, +87.2% over 5 years, Sharpe 1.48. The actual US30 backtest with v9 produced -$1,511 and PF 0.929. This led to splitting into two parallel projects: NAS100 optimization and a new DJI30 build for FundingPips broker.

The DJI30 FundingPips project (DJI30_TG_v1.x) went through nine sub-versions diagnosing multiple issues: ADX≥35 blocking 23,262 signals (fixed by lowering to 25), FVG distance too tight for DJI30 scale (FVGMaxDist 30→100pts, FVGLookback 30→50), wrong operating window (apertura NY 13-15h UTC was lateral, 15-19h UTC had no edge either), lot calculation bugs (tickSize=0 in FundingPips causing division errors, fixed with OrderCalcProfit() native MT5 function), CSV not generating in tester (fixed with FILE_COMMON flag), and backtest mode errors (OHLC M1 vs Every tick). Per-filter diagnostic counters were added in v1.5, revealing EMA alignment blocked 58.8% of post-ADX signals and MACD blocked 23.1%. The project concluded with an honest assessment that DJI30 on FundingPips shows no edge in any tested time window (WR 35-39% across all hours), and the recommendation was to either pursue NAS100 on RoboForex (v9, verified results) or US30 on RoboForex (v6, forward-tested with PF 2.375 on demo).

Key files produced: `US30_EA_v1` through `US30_EA_v9.mq5`, `DJI30_TG_v1.mq5` (through v1.9), `Triple_Gate_Strategy.docx` (professional strategy document), `PROMPT_NAS100_DESDE_CERO.md` (prompt for new chat to build NAS100 EA from scratch for FundingPips), and `US30_EA_v6_BASE.mq5` (clean base for US30 reconstruction). All files stored in `/mnt/user-data/outputs/`. Backtest CSVs and Excel reports in `/mnt/user-data/uploads/`. Transcripts in `/mnt/transcripts/`.

The person expressed strong frustration when the same lot calculation error persisted across multiple versions, explicitly stating they did not want more risk management errors and that previous EAs had solved this correctly. The correct solution was `OrderCalcProfit()` to get native MT5 point value, then dividing by `SYMBOL_POINT` to convert to price-unit value, combined with an `OrderCalc

content.text: Hola Claude. Eres un experto en desarrollo de estrategias rentable en trading cuantitativo. Quiero codificar una estrategia rentable para operar el US30, que me garantice una operacion diaria. Que estrategias propones?

chat_messages.text:
# Estrategias Cuantitativas para US30 (Dow Jones)

Aquí te presento las mejores opciones, ordenadas por robustez y facilidad de implementación:

---

## 🥇 1. Opening Range Breakout (ORB) — *La más recomendada*

**Lógica:** Los primeros 30 minutos del mercado (9:30–10:00 AM ET) forman un rango. Se opera la ruptura de ese rango.

- **Señal Long:** Precio cierra por encima del máximo del rango inicial
- **Señal Short:** Precio cierra por debajo del mínimo del rango inicial
- **Stop Loss:** Dentro del rango (máximo–mínimo)
- **Take Profit:** 1.5x o 2x el tamaño del rango
- **Garantía de operación diaria:** Muy alta (~90% de los días hay ruptura)

---

## 🥈 2. Mean Reversion VWAP Intraday

**Lógica:** El US30 tiende a volver al VWAP cuando se aleja demasiado.

- **Señal:** Precio > 1.5 desviaciones estándar del VWAP → entrada en contra
- **Filtro:** Solo operar en dirección de la tendencia del día (pre-market)
- **Ventaja:** Múltiples señales por día, alta frecuencia

---

## 🥉 3. Momentum de Apertura con Gap Fill

**Lógica:** Si el US30 abre con gap respecto al cierre anterior, tiende a llenarlo antes de las 11 AM.

- **Señal:** Gap > 0.15% → operar en dirección del llenado del gap
- **Estadística histórica:** ~65-70% de gaps se llenan el mismo día

---

## 4. Breakout de Londres → Continuación NY

**Lógica:** La dirección establecida en la sesión de Londres (3–8 AM ET) suele continuar en la apertura de NY.

- **Señal:** Tomar la dirección del movimiento de Londres al abrir NY
- **Filtro:** Confirmar con volumen en los primeros 15 min de NY

---

## 📊 Comparativa

| Estrategia | Señales/día | Win Rate Est. | Complejidad | Mejor horario |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ORB | 1-2 | 55-62% | Baja | 10:00–11:00 AM ET |
| VWAP Mean Reversion | 3-5 | 58-65% | Media | 10:00 AM–2:00 PM ET |
| Gap Fill | 1 | 63-70% | Baja | 9:30–11:00 AM ET |
| Londres → NY | 1 | 54-60% | Media | 9:30–10:30 AM ET |

---

## ⚠️ Consideraciones importantes

- **Ninguna estrategia "garantiza" ganancias** — el objetivo es tener **edge estadístico** con gestión de riesgo sólida
- Siempre usar **Stop Loss fijo** (recomiendo máximo 0.3–0.5% del capital por operación)
- Evitar operar los **30 minutos previos a noticias** de alto impacto (NFP, Fed, CPI)
- Hacer **backtesting mínimo de 6 meses** antes de operar real

---

¿Quieres que codifique alguna de estas estrategias en **Python (con backtrader o pandas)**, **Pine Script (TradingView)**, o **MQL5 (MetaTrader)**?

pip install MetaTrader5 pandas numpy requests beautifulsoup4 colorama tabulate

# 2. Ejecutar una vez
python us30_analyzer.py

# 3. Para modo continuo (actualiza cada 60s), editar la última línea:

input.description: Creating comprehensive US30 M5 analysis script for MT5
input.file_text:
"""
=============================================================================
US30 (Dow Jones) - Analizador Cuantitativo Avanzado M5
MetaTrader 5 + Python
=============================================================================
Incluye:
  - Conexión en tiempo real a MT5
  - RSI, MACD, EMA (9, 21, 50, 200)
  - Volumen Delta (Buy/Sell pressure)
  - Fair Value Gaps (FVG)
  - Patrones de velas (Engulfing, Doji, Hammer, Shooting Star, Pin Bar)
  - Patrones de movimiento (BOS, CHoCH, Liquidity Sweep)
  - Soporte / Resistencia automáticos (pivots)
  - Calendario económico (Investing.com scraping)
  - Señal final consolidada con score de confianza
  - Dashboard en consola con colores
=============================================================================
Instalación:
  pip install MetaTrader5 pandas numpy requests beautifulsoup4 colorama tabulate
=============================================================================
"""

import MetaTrader5 as mt5
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import time
import warnings
from colorama import init, Fore, Back, Style
from tabulate import tabulate

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
init(autoreset=True)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  CONFIGURACIÓN GLOBAL
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
SYMBOL          = "US30.cash"   # Ajusta al nombre exacto en tu broker (US30, DJ30, etc.)
TIMEFRAME       = mt5.TIMEFRAME_M5
BARS            = 500           # Velas a analizar
RISK_PER_TRADE  = 1.0           # % de riesgo por operación
ACCOUNT_BALANCE = None          # None = toma automáticamente del broker

# EMA periods
EMA_FAST   = 9
EMA_MID    = 21
EMA_SLOW   = 50
EMA_TREND  = 200

# RSI
RSI_PERIOD    = 14
RSI_OVERBOUGHT = 70
RSI_OVERSOLD   = 30

# MACD
MACD_FAST   = 12
MACD_SLOW   = 26
MACD_SIGNAL = 9

# S/R Pivots
SR_LOOKBACK = 20   # velas para detectar pivot
SR_LEVELS   = 5    # cuántos niveles mostrar


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  CONEXIÓN MT5
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def connect_mt5():
    if not mt5.initialize():
        print(Fore.RED + f"❌ Error conectando MT5: {mt5.last_error()}")
        return False
    info = mt5.account_info()
    if info is None:
        print(Fore.RED + "❌ No se pudo obtener información de cuenta.")
        return False
    print(Fore.GREEN + f"✅ Conectado a MT5 | Cuenta: {info.login} | Broker: {info.company}")
    print(Fore.CYAN + f"   Balance: ${info.balance:,.2f} | Equity: ${info.equity:,.2f}")
    return True


def get_ohlcv(symbol=SYMBOL, timeframe=TIMEFRAME, bars=BARS):
    rates = mt5.copy_rates_from_pos(symbol, timeframe, 0, bars)
    if rates is None or len(rates) == 0:
        print(Fore.RED + f"❌ No se pudieron obtener datos para {symbol}")
        print(Fore.YELLOW + f"   Símbolos disponibles con 'US': {[s.name for s in mt5.symbols_get() if 'US' in s.name.upper()][:10]}")
        return None
    df = pd.DataFrame(rates)
    df['time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['time'], unit='s')
    df.set_index('time', inplace=True)
    df.rename(columns={'open':'Open','high':'High','low':'Low','close':'Close','tick_volume':'Volume'}, inplace=True)
    return df


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  INDICADORES TÉCNICOS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def add_emas(df):
    for p in [EMA_FAST, EMA_MID, EMA_SLOW, EMA_TREND]:
        df[f'EMA{p}'] = df['Close'].ewm(span=p, adjust=False).mean()
    return df


def add_rsi(df, period=RSI_PERIOD):
    delta = df['Close'].diff()
    gain  = delta.clip(lower=0)
    loss  = -delta.clip(upper=0)
    avg_gain = gain.ewm(alpha=1/period, min_periods=period).mean()
    avg_loss = loss.ewm(alpha=1/period, min_periods=period).mean()
    rs = avg_gain / avg_loss
    df['RSI'] = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))
    return df


def add_macd(df):
    ema_fast   = df['Close'].ewm(span=MACD_FAST, adjust=False).mean()
    ema_slow   = df['Close'].ewm(span=MACD_SLOW, adjust=False).mean()
    df['MACD']        = ema_fast - ema_slow
    df['MACD_Signal'] = df['MACD'].ewm(span=MACD_SIGNAL, adjust=False).mean()
    df['MACD_Hist']   = df['MACD'] - df['MACD_Signal']
    return df


def add_volume_delta(df):
    """
    Aproximación del delta de volumen:
    Si cierre > apertura → volumen comprador
    Si cierre < apertura → volumen vendedor
    """
    df['BuyVol']   = np.where(df['Close'] >= df['Open'], df['Volume'], 0)
    df['SellVol']  = np.where(df['Close'] <  df['Open'], df['Volume'], 0)
    df['Delta']    = df['BuyVol'] - df['SellVol']
    df['CumDelta'] = df['Delta'].cumsum()
    # Delta relativo (% del volumen total)
    df['DeltaPct'] = df['Delta'] / df['Volume'].replace(0, 1) * 100
    return df


def add_atr(df, period=14):
    high_low   = df['High'] - df['Low']
    high_close = (df['High'] - df['Close'].shift()).abs()
    low_close  = (df['Low']  - df['Close'].shift()).abs()
    tr = pd.concat([high_low, high_close, low_close], axis=1).max(axis=1)
    df['ATR'] = tr.ewm(span=period, adjust=False).mean()
    return df


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  SOPORTE / RESISTENCIA AUTOMÁTICOS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def find_pivot_highs(df, lookback=SR_LOOKBACK):
    pivots = []
    for i in range(lookback, len(df) - lookback):
        if df['High'].iloc[i] == df['High'].iloc[i-lookback:i+lookback+1].max():
            pivots.append((df.index[i], df['High'].iloc[i]))
    return pivots


def find_pivot_lows(df, lookback=SR_LOOKBACK):
    pivots = []
    for i in range(lookback, len(df) - lookback):
        if df['Low'].iloc[i] == df['Low'].iloc[i-lookback:i+lookback+1].min():
            pivots.append((df.index[i], df['Low'].iloc[i]))
    return pivots


def get_sr_levels(df, n=SR_LEVELS):
    highs  = [p[1] for p in find_pivot_highs(df)]
    lows   = [p[1] for p in find_pivot_lows(df)]
    price  = df['Close'].iloc[-1]

    resistances = sorted([h for h in highs if h > price], reverse=False)[:n]
    supports    = sorted([l for l in lows  if l < price], reverse=True)[:n]
    return supports, resistances


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  FAIR VALUE GAPS (FVG)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def find_fvg(df, lookback=50):
    """
    Bullish FVG: Low[i] > High[i-2]  → gap alcista entre vela i-2 y vela i
    Bearish FVG: High[i] < Low[i-2]  → gap bajista
    """
    fvgs = []
    recent = df.iloc[-lookback:]
    for i in range(2, len(recent)):
        # Bullish FVG
        if recent['Low'].iloc[i] > recent['High'].iloc[i-2]:
            fvgs.append({
                'type'  : 'Bullish',
                'top'   : recent['Low'].iloc[i],
                'bottom': recent['High'].iloc[i-2],
                'time'  : recent.index[i],
                'mid'   : (recent['Low'].iloc[i] + recent['High'].iloc[i-2]) / 2
            })
        # Bearish FVG
        elif recent['High'].iloc[i] < recent['Low'].iloc[i-2]:
            fvgs.append({
                'type'  : 'Bearish',
                'top'   : recent['Low'].iloc[i-2],
                'bottom': recent['High'].iloc[i],
                'time'  : recent.index[i],
                'mid'   : (recent['Low'].iloc[i-2] + recent['High'].iloc[i]) / 2
            })
    return fvgs[-5:] if fvgs else []  # Últimos 5 FVGs


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  PATRONES DE VELAS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def detect_candle_patterns(df):
    patterns = []
    c = df.iloc[-1]
    p = df.iloc[-2]
    pp = df.iloc[-3]

    body      = abs(c['Close'] - c['Open'])
    full_range = c['High'] - c['Low']
    upper_wick = c['High'] - max(c['Close'], c['Open'])
    lower_wick = min(c['Close'], c['Open']) - c['Low']

    if full_range == 0:
        return patterns

    body_ratio  = body / full_range
    upper_ratio = upper_wick / full_range
    lower_ratio = lower_wick / full_range

    # Doji
    if body_ratio < 0.1:
        patterns.append(('Doji', 'NEUTRAL', '⚖️'))

    # Hammer (alcista)
    if lower_ratio > 0.6 and upper_ratio < 0.1 and c['Close'] > c['Open']:
        patterns.append(('Hammer', 'BULLISH', '🔨'))

    # Shooting Star (bajista)
    if upper_ratio > 0.6 and lower_ratio < 0.1 and c['Close'] < c['Open']:
        patterns.append(('Shooting Star', 'BEARISH', '⭐'))

    # Pin Bar alcista
    if lower_ratio > 0.65 and body_ratio < 0.25:
        patterns.append(('Pin Bar Alcista', 'BULLISH', '📍'))

    # Pin Bar bajista
    if upper_ratio > 0.65 and body_ratio < 0.25:
        patterns.append(('Pin Bar Bajista', 'BEARISH', '📍'))

    # Bullish Engulfing
    if (c['Close'] > c['Open'] and p['Close'] < p['Open'] and
            c['Open'] < p['Close'] and c['Close'] > p['Open']):
        patterns.append(('Bullish Engulfing', 'BULLISH', '🟢'))

    # Bearish Engulfing
    if (c['Close'] < c['Open'] and p['Close'] > p['Open'] and
            c['Open'] > p['Close'] and c['Close'] < p['Open']):
        patterns.append(('Bearish Engulfing', 'BEARISH', '🔴'))

    # Morning Star
    if (pp['Close'] < pp['Open'] and
            abs(p['Close'] - p['Open']) < abs(pp['Close'] - pp['Open']) * 0.3 and
            c['Close'] > c['Open'] and c['Close'] > (pp['Open'] + pp['Close']) / 2):
        patterns.append(('Morning Star', 'BULLISH', '🌅'))

    # Evening Star
    if (pp['Close'] > pp['Open'] and
            abs(p['Close'] - p['Open']) < abs(pp['Close'] - pp['Open']) * 0.3 and
            c['Close'] < c['Open'] and c['Close'] < (pp['Open'] + pp['Close']) / 2):
        patterns.append(('Evening Star', 'BEARISH', '🌆'))

    return patterns


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  PATRONES DE MOVIMIENTO (SMC)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def detect_market_structure(df, lookback=30):
    """
    Detecta:
    - BOS (Break of Structure)
    - CHoCH (Change of Character)
    - Liquidity Sweep
    """
    signals = []
    recent  = df.iloc[-lookback:]
    highs   = recent['High'].values
    lows    = recent['Low'].values
    closes  = recent['Close'].values

    # BOS Alcista: cierre rompe máximo reciente
    prev_high = highs[:-3].max()
    if closes[-1] > prev_high and closes[-2] <= prev_high:
        signals.append(('BOS Alcista', 'BULLISH', f'Rompe {prev_high:.0f}'))

    # BOS Bajista: cierre rompe mínimo reciente
    prev_low = lows[:-3].min()
    if closes[-1] < prev_low and closes[-2] >= prev_low:
        signals.append(('BOS Bajista', 'BEARISH', f'Rompe {prev_low:.0f}'))

    # CHoCH: inversión de tendencia
    last_5_highs = highs[-5:]
    last_5_lows  = lows[-5:]
    if last_5_highs[-1] < last_5_highs[-3] and last_5_lows[-1] < last_5_lows[-3]:
        signals.append(('CHoCH Bajista', 'BEARISH', 'Cambio de carácter'))
    elif last_5_highs[-1] > last_5_highs[-3] and last_5_lows[-1] > last_5_lows[-3]:
        signals.append(('CHoCH Alcista', 'BULLISH', 'Cambio de carácter'))

    # Liquidity Sweep (barrida de liquidez)
    swing_low  = lows[-10:-2].min()
    swing_high = highs[-10:-2].max()
    if lows[-1] < swing_low and closes[-1] > swing_low:
        signals.append(('Liq. Sweep LOW', 'BULLISH', f'Barrida bajo {swing_low:.0f}'))
    if highs[-1] > swing_high and closes[-1] < swing_high:
        signals.append(('Liq. Sweep HIGH', 'BEARISH', f'Barrida sobre {swing_high:.0f}'))

    return signals


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  CALENDARIO ECONÓMICO
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def get_economic_calendar():
    """Obtiene noticias de alto impacto del día desde Investing.com"""
    try:
        headers = {
            'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0',
            'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
            'Referer': 'https://www.investing.com/economic-calendar/'
        }
        url = "https://www.investing.com/economic-calendar/Service/getCalendarFilteredData"
        today = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
        data  = {
            'country[]': '5',  # USA
            'importance[]': ['2', '3'],  # Medium + High
            'dateFrom': today,
            'dateTo': today,
            'timeZone': '8',
            'timeFilter': 'timeRemain',
            'currentTab': 'today',
            'limit_from': '0'
        }
        r = requests.post(url, headers=headers, data=data, timeout=5)
        soup = BeautifulSoup(r.json().get('data', ''), 'html.parser')
        rows = soup.find_all('tr', class_='js-event-item')

        events = []
        for row in rows[:8]:
            try:
                time_el  = row.find('td', class_='time')
                name_el  = row.find('td', class_='event')
                imp_el   = row.find_all('i', class_='grayFullBullishIcon')
                if time_el and name_el:
                    impact = len(imp_el)
                    events.append({
                        'time'  : time_el.text.strip(),
                        'event' : name_el.text.strip()[:45],
                        'impact': '🔴' * impact if impact >= 3 else '🟡' * impact
                    })
            except:
                continue
        return events
    except Exception as e:
        return [{'time': 'N/A', 'event': f'No disponible ({str(e)[:30]})', 'impact': ''}]


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  MOTOR DE SEÑAL CONSOLIDADA
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def generate_signal(df, candle_patterns, market_structure, fvgs, supports, resistances):
    """
    Score de -10 (muy bajista) a +10 (muy alcista)
    """
    score  = 0
    detail = []
    last   = df.iloc[-1]
    price  = last['Close']

    # --- Tendencia EMA ---
    if price > last[f'EMA{EMA_TREND}']:
        score += 1.5; detail.append(f"✅ Precio sobre EMA{EMA_TREND}")
    else:
        score -= 1.5; detail.append(f"❌ Precio bajo EMA{EMA_TREND}")

    ema_alignment = (last[f'EMA{EMA_FAST}'] > last[f'EMA{EMA_MID}'] >
                     last[f'EMA{EMA_SLOW}'] > last[f'EMA{EMA_TREND}'])
    ema_bear_align = (last[f'EMA{EMA_FAST}'] < last[f'EMA{EMA_MID}'] <
                      last[f'EMA{EMA_SLOW}'] < last[f'EMA{EMA_TREND}'])
    if ema_alignment:
        score += 2; detail.append("✅ EMAs alineadas alcista")
    elif ema_bear_align:
        score -= 2; detail.append("❌ EMAs alineadas bajista")

    # --- RSI ---
    rsi = last['RSI']
    if rsi < RSI_OVERSOLD:
        score += 1.5; detail.append(f"✅ RSI sobrevendido ({rsi:.1f})")
    elif rsi > RSI_OVERBOUGHT:
        score -= 1.5; detail.append(f"❌ RSI sobrecomprado ({rsi:.1f})")
    elif 40 < rsi < 60:
        detail.append(f"⚖️  RSI neutral ({rsi:.1f})")

    # --- MACD ---
    if last['MACD'] > last['MACD_Signal'] and last['MACD_Hist'] > 0:
        score += 1.5; detail.append("✅ MACD cruce alcista")
    elif last['MACD'] < last['MACD_Signal'] and last['MACD_Hist'] < 0:
        score -= 1.5; detail.append("❌ MACD cruce bajista")

    # --- Delta de volumen ---
    delta_pct = last['DeltaPct']
    if delta_pct > 30:
        score += 1; detail.append(f"✅ Delta comprador fuerte ({delta_pct:.0f}%)")
    elif delta_pct < -30:
        score -= 1; detail.append(f"❌ Delta vendedor fuerte ({delta_pct:.0f}%)")

    # --- Patrones de velas ---
    for name, direction, emoji in candle_patterns:
        if direction == 'BULLISH':
            score += 1; detail.append(f"{emoji} Patrón alcista: {name}")
        elif direction == 'BEARISH':
            score -= 1; detail.append(f"{emoji} Patrón bajista: {name}")

    # --- Estructura de mercado (SMC) ---
    for name, direction, desc in market_structure:
        if direction == 'BULLISH':
            score += 1.5; detail.append(f"🟢 {name}: {desc}")
        elif direction == 'BEARISH':
            score -= 1.5; detail.append(f"🔴 {name}: {desc}")

    # --- FVG cercanos ---
    atr = last['ATR']
    for fvg in fvgs:
        dist = abs(price - fvg['mid'])
        if dist < atr:
            if fvg['type'] == 'Bullish' and price > fvg['mid']:
                score += 1; detail.append(f"🟩 FVG Bullish cercano ({fvg['mid']:.0f})")
            elif fvg['type'] == 'Bearish' and price < fvg['mid']:
                score -= 1; detail.append(f"🟥 FVG Bearish cercano ({fvg['mid']:.0f})")

    # --- Proximidad a S/R ---
    if supports:
        nearest_sup = supports[0]
        if abs(price - nearest_sup) < atr * 0.5:
            score += 0.5; detail.append(f"📊 Cerca de soporte ({nearest_sup:.0f})")
    if resistances:
        nearest_res = resistances[0]
        if abs(price - nearest_res) < atr * 0.5:
            score -= 0.5; detail.append(f"📊 Cerca de resistencia ({nearest_res:.0f})")

    # --- Señal final ---
    score = max(-10, min(10, score))
    if score >= 4:
        signal = 'COMPRA'
        confidence = min(int((score / 10) * 100), 95)
        color = Fore.GREEN
    elif score <= -4:
        signal = 'VENTA'
        confidence = min(int((-score / 10) * 100), 95)
        color = Fore.RED
    else:
        signal = 'ESPERAR'
        confidence = int((1 - abs(score) / 4) * 50 + 25)
        color = Fore.YELLOW

    return signal, score, confidence, detail, color


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  GESTIÓN DE RIESGO
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def calculate_risk(df, signal, risk_pct=RISK_PER_TRADE):
    last    = df.iloc[-1]
    price   = last['Close']
    atr     = last['ATR']
    balance = mt5.account_info().balance if ACCOUNT_BALANCE is None else ACCOUNT_BALANCE

    sl_pips = atr * 1.5
    tp_pips = atr * 3.0
    rr      = tp_pips / sl_pips

    risk_amount = balance * (risk_pct / 100)

    if signal == 'COMPRA':
        sl = price - sl_pips
        tp = price + tp_pips
    elif signal == 'VENTA':
        sl = price + sl_pips
        tp = price - tp_pips
    else:
        sl = tp = 0

    return {
        'price'      : price,
        'sl'         : sl,
        'tp'         : tp,
        'sl_pips'    : sl_pips,
        'tp_pips'    : tp_pips,
        'rr'         : rr,
        'risk_amount': risk_amount,
        'atr'        : atr,
        'balance'    : balance
    }


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  DASHBOARD PRINCIPAL
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def print_dashboard(df, signal, score, confidence, detail, color, risk,
                    supports, resistances, fvgs, candle_patterns,
                    market_structure, calendar_events):

    price = df['Close'].iloc[-1]
    last  = df.iloc[-1]
    now   = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')

    print("\n" + "═"*70)
    print(Fore.CYAN + Style.BRIGHT + f"  📊 US30 ANALYZER | M5 | {now}")
    print("═"*70)

    # Precio y señal principal
    signal_display = {
        'COMPRA' : Back.GREEN + Fore.WHITE + Style.BRIGHT + "  📈 COMPRA  ",
        'VENTA'  : Back.RED   + Fore.WHITE + Style.BRIGHT + "  📉 VENTA   ",
        'ESPERAR': Back.YELLOW + Fore.BLACK + Style.BRIGHT + "  ⏸ ESPERAR ",
    }
    print(f"\n  Precio actual : {Fore.WHITE + Style.BRIGHT}{price:,.2f}")
    print(f"  Señal         : {signal_display[signal]}{Style.RESET_ALL}")
    print(f"  Score         : {color}{score:+.1f} / 10")
    print(f"  Confianza     : {color}{confidence}%\n")

    # Indicadores técnicos
    print(Fore.CYAN + "─── INDICADORES ──────────────────────────────────────────")
    ema_data = [
        ["EMA9",  f"{last['EMA9']:.2f}",  "✅" if price > last['EMA9']  else "❌"],
        ["EMA21", f"{last['EMA21']:.2f}", "✅" if price > last['EMA21'] else "❌"],
        ["EMA50", f"{last['EMA50']:.2f}", "✅" if price > last['EMA50'] else "❌"],
        ["EMA200",f"{last['EMA200']:.2f}","✅" if price > last['EMA200'] else "❌"],
    ]
    print(tabulate(ema_data, headers=["Indicador","Valor","Precio"], tablefmt="simple"))
    print(f"  RSI({RSI_PERIOD})   : {last['RSI']:.2f}  |  MACD: {last['MACD']:.2f}  |  Hist: {last['MACD_Hist']:.2f}")
    print(f"  ATR(14) : {last['ATR']:.2f}  |  Delta Vol: {last['DeltaPct']:+.1f}%  |  Vol: {int(last['Volume']):,}")

    # Soporte / Resistencia
    print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── SOPORTE / RESISTENCIA ────────────────────────────────")
    if resistances:
        for r in resistances[:3]:
            dist = r - price
            print(f"  🔴 Resistencia: {r:,.2f}  (+{dist:.2f})")
    print(f"  ⚪ PRECIO:      {price:,.2f} ◄")
    if supports:
        for s in supports[:3]:
            dist = price - s
            print(f"  🟢 Soporte:     {s:,.2f}  (-{dist:.2f})")

    # FVGs
    if fvgs:
        print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── FAIR VALUE GAPS ──────────────────────────────────────")
        for fvg in fvgs[-3:]:
            color_fvg = Fore.GREEN if fvg['type'] == 'Bullish' else Fore.RED
            print(f"  {color_fvg}{fvg['type']:8s} FVG | {fvg['bottom']:.0f} – {fvg['top']:.0f}  (mid: {fvg['mid']:.0f})")

    # Patrones de velas
    if candle_patterns:
        print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── PATRONES DE VELAS ────────────────────────────────────")
        for name, direction, emoji in candle_patterns:
            c = Fore.GREEN if direction == 'BULLISH' else (Fore.RED if direction == 'BEARISH' else Fore.YELLOW)
            print(f"  {emoji} {c}{name:25s} [{direction}]")

    # Estructura de mercado
    if market_structure:
        print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── ESTRUCTURA DE MERCADO (SMC) ──────────────────────────")
        for name, direction, desc in market_structure:
            c = Fore.GREEN if direction == 'BULLISH' else Fore.RED
            print(f"  {c}▶ {name:20s} | {desc}")

    # Razones del score
    print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── ANÁLISIS DETALLADO ───────────────────────────────────")
    for d in detail:
        print(f"  {d}")

    # Gestión de riesgo
    if signal in ['COMPRA', 'VENTA']:
        print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── GESTIÓN DE RIESGO ────────────────────────────────────")
        rr_color = Fore.GREEN if risk['rr'] >= 2 else Fore.YELLOW
        print(f"  Entrada : {risk['price']:,.2f}")
        tp_color = Fore.GREEN if signal == 'COMPRA' else Fore.RED
        sl_color = Fore.RED   if signal == 'COMPRA' else Fore.GREEN
        print(f"  {tp_color}TP      : {risk['tp']:,.2f}  (+{risk['tp_pips']:.2f} pts)")
        print(f"  {sl_color}SL      : {risk['sl']:,.2f}  (-{risk['sl_pips']:.2f} pts)")
        print(f"  {rr_color}R:R     : 1 : {risk['rr']:.2f}")
        print(f"  Balance : ${risk['balance']:,.2f}  |  Riesgo: ${risk['risk_amount']:.2f} ({RISK_PER_TRADE}%)")

    # Calendario económico
    if calendar_events:
        print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── CALENDARIO ECONÓMICO (HOY · USA) ─────────────────────")
        cal_table = [[e['time'], e['impact'], e['event']] for e in calendar_events]
        print(tabulate(cal_table, headers=["Hora","Impact","Evento"], tablefmt="simple"))

    print("\n" + "═"*70 + "\n")


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  BUCLE PRINCIPAL
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def run(loop=False, interval_seconds=60):
    """
    loop=True → actualiza cada `interval_seconds`
    loop=False → una sola ejecución
    """
    if not connect_mt5():
        return

    print(Fore.YELLOW + "\n📅 Obteniendo calendario económico...")
    calendar_events = get_economic_calendar()

    while True:
        print(Fore.YELLOW + f"\n🔄 Obteniendo datos M5 de {SYMBOL}...")
        df = get_ohlcv()
        if df is None:
            break

        # Calcular indicadores
        df = add_emas(df)
        df = add_rsi(df)
        df = add_macd(df)
        df = add_volume_delta(df)
        df = add_atr(df)

        # Análisis estructural
        supports, resistances  = get_sr_levels(df)
        fvgs                   = find_fvg(df)
        candle_patterns        = detect_candle_patterns(df)
        market_structure       = detect_market_structure(df)

        # Señal consolidada
        signal, score, confidence, detail, sig_color = generate_signal(
            df, candle_patterns, market_structure, fvgs, supports, resistances)

        # Gestión de riesgo
        risk = calculate_risk(df, signal)

        # Dashboard
        print_dashboard(df, signal, score, confidence, detail, sig_color, risk,
                        supports, resistances, fvgs, candle_patterns,
                        market_structure, calendar_events)

        if not loop:
            break

        print(Fore.CYAN + f"⏱  Próxima actualización en {interval_seconds}s... (Ctrl+C para salir)")
        time.sleep(interval_seconds)

    mt5.shutdown()
    print(Fore.YELLOW + "🔌 MT5 desconectado.")


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  PUNTO DE ENTRADA
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(Fore.CYAN + Style.BRIGHT + """
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║     US30 Quantitative Analyzer v1.0  |  M5 Timeframe    ║
║     RSI · MACD · EMA · FVG · SMC · Delta · S/R          ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
""")
    # Cambiar loop=True para actualización continua cada 60 segundos
    run(loop=False, interval_seconds=60)

content.message: Creating comprehensive US30 M5 analysis script for MT5

display_content.json_block:
{"language": "python", "code": """"
=============================================================================
US30 (Dow Jones) - Analizador Cuantitativo Avanzado M5
MetaTrader 5 + Python
=============================================================================
Incluye:
  - Conexión en tiempo real a MT5
  - RSI, MACD, EMA (9, 21, 50, 200)
  - Volumen Delta (Buy/Sell pressure)
  - Fair Value Gaps (FVG)
  - Patrones de velas (Engulfing, Doji, Hammer, Shooting Star, Pin Bar)
  - Patrones de movimiento (BOS, CHoCH, Liquidity Sweep)
  - Soporte / Resistencia automáticos (pivots)
  - Calendario económico (Investing.com scraping)
  - Señal final consolidada con score de confianza
  - Dashboard en consola con colores
=============================================================================
Instalación:
  pip install MetaTrader5 pandas numpy requests beautifulsoup4 colorama tabulate
=============================================================================
"""

import MetaTrader5 as mt5
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import time
import warnings
from colorama import init, Fore, Back, Style
from tabulate import tabulate

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
init(autoreset=True)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  CONFIGURACIÓN GLOBAL
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
SYMBOL          = "US30.cash"   # Ajusta al nombre exacto en tu broker (US30, DJ30, etc.)
TIMEFRAME       = mt5.TIMEFRAME_M5
BARS            = 500           # Velas a analizar
RISK_PER_TRADE  = 1.0           # % de riesgo por operación
ACCOUNT_BALANCE = None          # None = toma automáticamente del broker

# EMA periods
EMA_FAST   = 9
EMA_MID    = 21
EMA_SLOW   = 50
EMA_TREND  = 200

# RSI
RSI_PERIOD    = 14
RSI_OVERBOUGHT = 70
RSI_OVERSOLD   = 30

# MACD
MACD_FAST   = 12
MACD_SLOW   = 26
MACD_SIGNAL = 9

# S/R Pivots
SR_LOOKBACK = 20   # velas para detectar pivot
SR_LEVELS   = 5    # cuántos niveles mostrar


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  CONEXIÓN MT5
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def connect_mt5():
    if not mt5.initialize():
        print(Fore.RED + f"❌ Error conectando MT5: {mt5.last_error()}")
        return False
    info = mt5.account_info()
    if info is None:
        print(Fore.RED + "❌ No se pudo obtener información de cuenta.")
        return False
    print(Fore.GREEN + f"✅ Conectado a MT5 | Cuenta: {info.login} | Broker: {info.company}")
    print(Fore.CYAN + f"   Balance: ${info.balance:,.2f} | Equity: ${info.equity:,.2f}")
    return True


def get_ohlcv(symbol=SYMBOL, timeframe=TIMEFRAME, bars=BARS):
    rates = mt5.copy_rates_from_pos(symbol, timeframe, 0, bars)
    if rates is None or len(rates) == 0:
        print(Fore.RED + f"❌ No se pudieron obtener datos para {symbol}")
        print(Fore.YELLOW + f"   Símbolos disponibles con 'US': {[s.name for s in mt5.symbols_get() if 'US' in s.name.upper()][:10]}")
        return None
    df = pd.DataFrame(rates)
    df['time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['time'], unit='s')
    df.set_index('time', inplace=True)
    df.rename(columns={'open':'Open','high':'High','low':'Low','close':'Close','tick_volume':'Volume'}, inplace=True)
    return df


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  INDICADORES TÉCNICOS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def add_emas(df):
    for p in [EMA_FAST, EMA_MID, EMA_SLOW, EMA_TREND]:
        df[f'EMA{p}'] = df['Close'].ewm(span=p, adjust=False).mean()
    return df


def add_rsi(df, period=RSI_PERIOD):
    delta = df['Close'].diff()
    gain  = delta.clip(lower=0)
    loss  = -delta.clip(upper=0)
    avg_gain = gain.ewm(alpha=1/period, min_periods=period).mean()
    avg_loss = loss.ewm(alpha=1/period, min_periods=period).mean()
    rs = avg_gain / avg_loss
    df['RSI'] = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))
    return df


def add_macd(df):
    ema_fast   = df['Close'].ewm(span=MACD_FAST, adjust=False).mean()
    ema_slow   = df['Close'].ewm(span=MACD_SLOW, adjust=False).mean()
    df['MACD']        = ema_fast - ema_slow
    df['MACD_Signal'] = df['MACD'].ewm(span=MACD_SIGNAL, adjust=False).mean()
    df['MACD_Hist']   = df['MACD'] - df['MACD_Signal']
    return df


def add_volume_delta(df):
    """
    Aproximación del delta de volumen:
    Si cierre > apertura → volumen comprador
    Si cierre < apertura → volumen vendedor
    """
    df['BuyVol']   = np.where(df['Close'] >= df['Open'], df['Volume'], 0)
    df['SellVol']  = np.where(df['Close'] <  df['Open'], df['Volume'], 0)
    df['Delta']    = df['BuyVol'] - df['SellVol']
    df['CumDelta'] = df['Delta'].cumsum()
    # Delta relativo (% del volumen total)
    df['DeltaPct'] = df['Delta'] / df['Volume'].replace(0, 1) * 100
    return df


def add_atr(df, period=14):
    high_low   = df['High'] - df['Low']
    high_close = (df['High'] - df['Close'].shift()).abs()
    low_close  = (df['Low']  - df['Close'].shift()).abs()
    tr = pd.concat([high_low, high_close, low_close], axis=1).max(axis=1)
    df['ATR'] = tr.ewm(span=period, adjust=False).mean()
    return df


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  SOPORTE / RESISTENCIA AUTOMÁTICOS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def find_pivot_highs(df, lookback=SR_LOOKBACK):
    pivots = []
    for i in range(lookback, len(df) - lookback):
        if df['High'].iloc[i] == df['High'].iloc[i-lookback:i+lookback+1].max():
            pivots.append((df.index[i], df['High'].iloc[i]))
    return pivots


def find_pivot_lows(df, lookback=SR_LOOKBACK):
    pivots = []
    for i in range(lookback, len(df) - lookback):
        if df['Low'].iloc[i] == df['Low'].iloc[i-lookback:i+lookback+1].min():
            pivots.append((df.index[i], df['Low'].iloc[i]))
    return pivots


def get_sr_levels(df, n=SR_LEVELS):
    highs  = [p[1] for p in find_pivot_highs(df)]
    lows   = [p[1] for p in find_pivot_lows(df)]
    price  = df['Close'].iloc[-1]

    resistances = sorted([h for h in highs if h > price], reverse=False)[:n]
    supports    = sorted([l for l in lows  if l < price], reverse=True)[:n]
    return supports, resistances


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  FAIR VALUE GAPS (FVG)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def find_fvg(df, lookback=50):
    """
    Bullish FVG: Low[i] > High[i-2]  → gap alcista entre vela i-2 y vela i
    Bearish FVG: High[i] < Low[i-2]  → gap bajista
    """
    fvgs = []
    recent = df.iloc[-lookback:]
    for i in range(2, len(recent)):
        # Bullish FVG
        if recent['Low'].iloc[i] > recent['High'].iloc[i-2]:
            fvgs.append({
                'type'  : 'Bullish',
                'top'   : recent['Low'].iloc[i],
                'bottom': recent['High'].iloc[i-2],
                'time'  : recent.index[i],
                'mid'   : (recent['Low'].iloc[i] + recent['High'].iloc[i-2]) / 2
            })
        # Bearish FVG
        elif recent['High'].iloc[i] < recent['Low'].iloc[i-2]:
            fvgs.append({
                'type'  : 'Bearish',
                'top'   : recent['Low'].iloc[i-2],
                'bottom': recent['High'].iloc[i],
                'time'  : recent.index[i],
                'mid'   : (recent['Low'].iloc[i-2] + recent['High'].iloc[i]) / 2
            })
    return fvgs[-5:] if fvgs else []  # Últimos 5 FVGs


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  PATRONES DE VELAS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def detect_candle_patterns(df):
    patterns = []
    c = df.iloc[-1]
    p = df.iloc[-2]
    pp = df.iloc[-3]

    body      = abs(c['Close'] - c['Open'])
    full_range = c['High'] - c['Low']
    upper_wick = c['High'] - max(c['Close'], c['Open'])
    lower_wick = min(c['Close'], c['Open']) - c['Low']

    if full_range == 0:
        return patterns

    body_ratio  = body / full_range
    upper_ratio = upper_wick / full_range
    lower_ratio = lower_wick / full_range

    # Doji
    if body_ratio < 0.1:
        patterns.append(('Doji', 'NEUTRAL', '⚖️'))

    # Hammer (alcista)
    if lower_ratio > 0.6 and upper_ratio < 0.1 and c['Close'] > c['Open']:
        patterns.append(('Hammer', 'BULLISH', '🔨'))

    # Shooting Star (bajista)
    if upper_ratio > 0.6 and lower_ratio < 0.1 and c['Close'] < c['Open']:
        patterns.append(('Shooting Star', 'BEARISH', '⭐'))

    # Pin Bar alcista
    if lower_ratio > 0.65 and body_ratio < 0.25:
        patterns.append(('Pin Bar Alcista', 'BULLISH', '📍'))

    # Pin Bar bajista
    if upper_ratio > 0.65 and body_ratio < 0.25:
        patterns.append(('Pin Bar Bajista', 'BEARISH', '📍'))

    # Bullish Engulfing
    if (c['Close'] > c['Open'] and p['Close'] < p['Open'] and
            c['Open'] < p['Close'] and c['Close'] > p['Open']):
        patterns.append(('Bullish Engulfing', 'BULLISH', '🟢'))

    # Bearish Engulfing
    if (c['Close'] < c['Open'] and p['Close'] > p['Open'] and
            c['Open'] > p['Close'] and c['Close'] < p['Open']):
        patterns.append(('Bearish Engulfing', 'BEARISH', '🔴'))

    # Morning Star
    if (pp['Close'] < pp['Open'] and
            abs(p['Close'] - p['Open']) < abs(pp['Close'] - pp['Open']) * 0.3 and
            c['Close'] > c['Open'] and c['Close'] > (pp['Open'] + pp['Close']) / 2):
        patterns.append(('Morning Star', 'BULLISH', '🌅'))

    # Evening Star
    if (pp['Close'] > pp['Open'] and
            abs(p['Close'] - p['Open']) < abs(pp['Close'] - pp['Open']) * 0.3 and
            c['Close'] < c['Open'] and c['Close'] < (pp['Open'] + pp['Close']) / 2):
        patterns.append(('Evening Star', 'BEARISH', '🌆'))

    return patterns


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  PATRONES DE MOVIMIENTO (SMC)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def detect_market_structure(df, lookback=30):
    """
    Detecta:
    - BOS (Break of Structure)
    - CHoCH (Change of Character)
    - Liquidity Sweep
    """
    signals = []
    recent  = df.iloc[-lookback:]
    highs   = recent['High'].values
    lows    = recent['Low'].values
    closes  = recent['Close'].values

    # BOS Alcista: cierre rompe máximo reciente
    prev_high = highs[:-3].max()
    if closes[-1] > prev_high and closes[-2] <= prev_high:
        signals.append(('BOS Alcista', 'BULLISH', f'Rompe {prev_high:.0f}'))

    # BOS Bajista: cierre rompe mínimo reciente
    prev_low = lows[:-3].min()
    if closes[-1] < prev_low and closes[-2] >= prev_low:
        signals.append(('BOS Bajista', 'BEARISH', f'Rompe {prev_low:.0f}'))

    # CHoCH: inversión de tendencia
    last_5_highs = highs[-5:]
    last_5_lows  = lows[-5:]
    if last_5_highs[-1] < last_5_highs[-3] and last_5_lows[-1] < last_5_lows[-3]:
        signals.append(('CHoCH Bajista', 'BEARISH', 'Cambio de carácter'))
    elif last_5_highs[-1] > last_5_highs[-3] and last_5_lows[-1] > last_5_lows[-3]:
        signals.append(('CHoCH Alcista', 'BULLISH', 'Cambio de carácter'))

    # Liquidity Sweep (barrida de liquidez)
    swing_low  = lows[-10:-2].min()
    swing_high = highs[-10:-2].max()
    if lows[-1] < swing_low and closes[-1] > swing_low:
        signals.append(('Liq. Sweep LOW', 'BULLISH', f'Barrida bajo {swing_low:.0f}'))
    if highs[-1] > swing_high and closes[-1] < swing_high:
        signals.append(('Liq. Sweep HIGH', 'BEARISH', f'Barrida sobre {swing_high:.0f}'))

    return signals


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  CALENDARIO ECONÓMICO
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def get_economic_calendar():
    """Obtiene noticias de alto impacto del día desde Investing.com"""
    try:
        headers = {
            'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0',
            'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
            'Referer': 'https://www.investing.com/economic-calendar/'
        }
        url = "https://www.investing.com/economic-calendar/Service/getCalendarFilteredData"
        today = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
        data  = {
            'country[]': '5',  # USA
            'importance[]': ['2', '3'],  # Medium + High
            'dateFrom': today,
            'dateTo': today,
            'timeZone': '8',
            'timeFilter': 'timeRemain',
            'currentTab': 'today',
            'limit_from': '0'
        }
        r = requests.post(url, headers=headers, data=data, timeout=5)
        soup = BeautifulSoup(r.json().get('data', ''), 'html.parser')
        rows = soup.find_all('tr', class_='js-event-item')

        events = []
        for row in rows[:8]:
            try:
                time_el  = row.find('td', class_='time')
                name_el  = row.find('td', class_='event')
                imp_el   = row.find_all('i', class_='grayFullBullishIcon')
                if time_el and name_el:
                    impact = len(imp_el)
                    events.append({
                        'time'  : time_el.text.strip(),
                        'event' : name_el.text.strip()[:45],
                        'impact': '🔴' * impact if impact >= 3 else '🟡' * impact
                    })
            except:
                continue
        return events
    except Exception as e:
        return [{'time': 'N/A', 'event': f'No disponible ({str(e)[:30]})', 'impact': ''}]


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  MOTOR DE SEÑAL CONSOLIDADA
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def generate_signal(df, candle_patterns, market_structure, fvgs, supports, resistances):
    """
    Score de -10 (muy bajista) a +10 (muy alcista)
    """
    score  = 0
    detail = []
    last   = df.iloc[-1]
    price  = last['Close']

    # --- Tendencia EMA ---
    if price > last[f'EMA{EMA_TREND}']:
        score += 1.5; detail.append(f"✅ Precio sobre EMA{EMA_TREND}")
    else:
        score -= 1.5; detail.append(f"❌ Precio bajo EMA{EMA_TREND}")

    ema_alignment = (last[f'EMA{EMA_FAST}'] > last[f'EMA{EMA_MID}'] >
                     last[f'EMA{EMA_SLOW}'] > last[f'EMA{EMA_TREND}'])
    ema_bear_align = (last[f'EMA{EMA_FAST}'] < last[f'EMA{EMA_MID}'] <
                      last[f'EMA{EMA_SLOW}'] < last[f'EMA{EMA_TREND}'])
    if ema_alignment:
        score += 2; detail.append("✅ EMAs alineadas alcista")
    elif ema_bear_align:
        score -= 2; detail.append("❌ EMAs alineadas bajista")

    # --- RSI ---
    rsi = last['RSI']
    if rsi < RSI_OVERSOLD:
        score += 1.5; detail.append(f"✅ RSI sobrevendido ({rsi:.1f})")
    elif rsi > RSI_OVERBOUGHT:
        score -= 1.5; detail.append(f"❌ RSI sobrecomprado ({rsi:.1f})")
    elif 40 < rsi < 60:
        detail.append(f"⚖️  RSI neutral ({rsi:.1f})")

    # --- MACD ---
    if last['MACD'] > last['MACD_Signal'] and last['MACD_Hist'] > 0:
        score += 1.5; detail.append("✅ MACD cruce alcista")
    elif last['MACD'] < last['MACD_Signal'] and last['MACD_Hist'] < 0:
        score -= 1.5; detail.append("❌ MACD cruce bajista")

    # --- Delta de volumen ---
    delta_pct = last['DeltaPct']
    if delta_pct > 30:
        score += 1; detail.append(f"✅ Delta comprador fuerte ({delta_pct:.0f}%)")
    elif delta_pct < -30:
        score -= 1; detail.append(f"❌ Delta vendedor fuerte ({delta_pct:.0f}%)")

    # --- Patrones de velas ---
    for name, direction, emoji in candle_patterns:
        if direction == 'BULLISH':
            score += 1; detail.append(f"{emoji} Patrón alcista: {name}")
        elif direction == 'BEARISH':
            score -= 1; detail.append(f"{emoji} Patrón bajista: {name}")

    # --- Estructura de mercado (SMC) ---
    for name, direction, desc in market_structure:
        if direction == 'BULLISH':
            score += 1.5; detail.append(f"🟢 {name}: {desc}")
        elif direction == 'BEARISH':
            score -= 1.5; detail.append(f"🔴 {name}: {desc}")

    # --- FVG cercanos ---
    atr = last['ATR']
    for fvg in fvgs:
        dist = abs(price - fvg['mid'])
        if dist < atr:
            if fvg['type'] == 'Bullish' and price > fvg['mid']:
                score += 1; detail.append(f"🟩 FVG Bullish cercano ({fvg['mid']:.0f})")
            elif fvg['type'] == 'Bearish' and price < fvg['mid']:
                score -= 1; detail.append(f"🟥 FVG Bearish cercano ({fvg['mid']:.0f})")

    # --- Proximidad a S/R ---
    if supports:
        nearest_sup = supports[0]
        if abs(price - nearest_sup) < atr * 0.5:
            score += 0.5; detail.append(f"📊 Cerca de soporte ({nearest_sup:.0f})")
    if resistances:
        nearest_res = resistances[0]
        if abs(price - nearest_res) < atr * 0.5:
            score -= 0.5; detail.append(f"📊 Cerca de resistencia ({nearest_res:.0f})")

    # --- Señal final ---
    score = max(-10, min(10, score))
    if score >= 4:
        signal = 'COMPRA'
        confidence = min(int((score / 10) * 100), 95)
        color = Fore.GREEN
    elif score <= -4:
        signal = 'VENTA'
        confidence = min(int((-score / 10) * 100), 95)
        color = Fore.RED
    else:
        signal = 'ESPERAR'
        confidence = int((1 - abs(score) / 4) * 50 + 25)
        color = Fore.YELLOW

    return signal, score, confidence, detail, color


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  GESTIÓN DE RIESGO
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def calculate_risk(df, signal, risk_pct=RISK_PER_TRADE):
    last    = df.iloc[-1]
    price   = last['Close']
    atr     = last['ATR']
    balance = mt5.account_info().balance if ACCOUNT_BALANCE is None else ACCOUNT_BALANCE

    sl_pips = atr * 1.5
    tp_pips = atr * 3.0
    rr      = tp_pips / sl_pips

    risk_amount = balance * (risk_pct / 100)

    if signal == 'COMPRA':
        sl = price - sl_pips
        tp = price + tp_pips
    elif signal == 'VENTA':
        sl = price + sl_pips
        tp = price - tp_pips
    else:
        sl = tp = 0

    return {
        'price'      : price,
        'sl'         : sl,
        'tp'         : tp,
        'sl_pips'    : sl_pips,
        'tp_pips'    : tp_pips,
        'rr'         : rr,
        'risk_amount': risk_amount,
        'atr'        : atr,
        'balance'    : balance
    }


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  DASHBOARD PRINCIPAL
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def print_dashboard(df, signal, score, confidence, detail, color, risk,
                    supports, resistances, fvgs, candle_patterns,
                    market_structure, calendar_events):

    price = df['Close'].iloc[-1]
    last  = df.iloc[-1]
    now   = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')

    print("\n" + "═"*70)
    print(Fore.CYAN + Style.BRIGHT + f"  📊 US30 ANALYZER | M5 | {now}")
    print("═"*70)

    # Precio y señal principal
    signal_display = {
        'COMPRA' : Back.GREEN + Fore.WHITE + Style.BRIGHT + "  📈 COMPRA  ",
        'VENTA'  : Back.RED   + Fore.WHITE + Style.BRIGHT + "  📉 VENTA   ",
        'ESPERAR': Back.YELLOW + Fore.BLACK + Style.BRIGHT + "  ⏸ ESPERAR ",
    }
    print(f"\n  Precio actual : {Fore.WHITE + Style.BRIGHT}{price:,.2f}")
    print(f"  Señal         : {signal_display[signal]}{Style.RESET_ALL}")
    print(f"  Score         : {color}{score:+.1f} / 10")
    print(f"  Confianza     : {color}{confidence}%\n")

    # Indicadores técnicos
    print(Fore.CYAN + "─── INDICADORES ──────────────────────────────────────────")
    ema_data = [
        ["EMA9",  f"{last['EMA9']:.2f}",  "✅" if price > last['EMA9']  else "❌"],
        ["EMA21", f"{last['EMA21']:.2f}", "✅" if price > last['EMA21'] else "❌"],
        ["EMA50", f"{last['EMA50']:.2f}", "✅" if price > last['EMA50'] else "❌"],
        ["EMA200",f"{last['EMA200']:.2f}","✅" if price > last['EMA200'] else "❌"],
    ]
    print(tabulate(ema_data, headers=["Indicador","Valor","Precio"], tablefmt="simple"))
    print(f"  RSI({RSI_PERIOD})   : {last['RSI']:.2f}  |  MACD: {last['MACD']:.2f}  |  Hist: {last['MACD_Hist']:.2f}")
    print(f"  ATR(14) : {last['ATR']:.2f}  |  Delta Vol: {last['DeltaPct']:+.1f}%  |  Vol: {int(last['Volume']):,}")

    # Soporte / Resistencia
    print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── SOPORTE / RESISTENCIA ────────────────────────────────")
    if resistances:
        for r in resistances[:3]:
            dist = r - price
            print(f"  🔴 Resistencia: {r:,.2f}  (+{dist:.2f})")
    print(f"  ⚪ PRECIO:      {price:,.2f} ◄")
    if supports:
        for s in supports[:3]:
            dist = price - s
            print(f"  🟢 Soporte:     {s:,.2f}  (-{dist:.2f})")

    # FVGs
    if fvgs:
        print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── FAIR VALUE GAPS ──────────────────────────────────────")
        for fvg in fvgs[-3:]:
            color_fvg = Fore.GREEN if fvg['type'] == 'Bullish' else Fore.RED
            print(f"  {color_fvg}{fvg['type']:8s} FVG | {fvg['bottom']:.0f} – {fvg['top']:.0f}  (mid: {fvg['mid']:.0f})")

    # Patrones de velas
    if candle_patterns:
        print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── PATRONES DE VELAS ────────────────────────────────────")
        for name, direction, emoji in candle_patterns:
            c = Fore.GREEN if direction == 'BULLISH' else (Fore.RED if direction == 'BEARISH' else Fore.YELLOW)
            print(f"  {emoji} {c}{name:25s} [{direction}]")

    # Estructura de mercado
    if market_structure:
        print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── ESTRUCTURA DE MERCADO (SMC) ──────────────────────────")
        for name, direction, desc in market_structure:
            c = Fore.GREEN if direction == 'BULLISH' else Fore.RED
            print(f"  {c}▶ {name:20s} | {desc}")

    # Razones del score
    print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── ANÁLISIS DETALLADO ───────────────────────────────────")
    for d in detail:
        print(f"  {d}")

    # Gestión de riesgo
    if signal in ['COMPRA', 'VENTA']:
        print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── GESTIÓN DE RIESGO ────────────────────────────────────")
        rr_color = Fore.GREEN if risk['rr'] >= 2 else Fore.YELLOW
        print(f"  Entrada : {risk['price']:,.2f}")
        tp_color = Fore.GREEN if signal == 'COMPRA' else Fore.RED
        sl_color = Fore.RED   if signal == 'COMPRA' else Fore.GREEN
        print(f"  {tp_color}TP      : {risk['tp']:,.2f}  (+{risk['tp_pips']:.2f} pts)")
        print(f"  {sl_color}SL      : {risk['sl']:,.2f}  (-{risk['sl_pips']:.2f} pts)")
        print(f"  {rr_color}R:R     : 1 : {risk['rr']:.2f}")
        print(f"  Balance : ${risk['balance']:,.2f}  |  Riesgo: ${risk['risk_amount']:.2f} ({RISK_PER_TRADE}%)")

    # Calendario económico
    if calendar_events:
        print(Fore.CYAN + "\n─── CALENDARIO ECONÓMICO (HOY · USA) ─────────────────────")
        cal_table = [[e['time'], e['impact'], e['event']] for e in calendar_events]
        print(tabulate(cal_table, headers=["Hora","Impact","Evento"], tablefmt="simple"))

    print("\n" + "═"*70 + "\n")


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  BUCLE PRINCIPAL
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def run(loop=False, interval_seconds=60):
    """
    loop=True → actualiza cada `interval_seconds`
    loop=False → una sola ejecución
    """
    if not connect_mt5():
        return

    print(Fore.YELLOW + "\n📅 Obteniendo calendario económico...")
    calendar_events = get_economic_calendar()

    while True:
        print(Fore.YELLOW + f"\n🔄 Obteniendo datos M5 de {SYMBOL}...")
        df = get_ohlcv()
        if df is None:
            break

        # Calcular indicadores
        df = add_emas(df)
        df = add_rsi(df)
        df = add_macd(df)
        df = add_volume_delta(df)
        df = add_atr(df)

        # Análisis estructural
        supports, resistances  = get_sr_levels(df)
        fvgs                   = find_fvg(df)
        candle_patterns        = detect_candle_patterns(df)
        market_structure       = detect_market_structure(df)

        # Señal consolidada
        signal, score, confidence, detail, sig_color = generate_signal(
            df, candle_patterns, market_structure, fvgs, supports, resistances)

        # Gestión de riesgo
        risk = calculate_risk(df, signal)

        # Dashboard
        print_dashboard(df, signal, score, confidence, detail, sig_color, risk,
                        supports, resistances, fvgs, candle_patterns,
                        market_structure, calendar_events)

        if not loop:
            break

        print(Fore.CYAN + f"⏱  Próxima actualización en {interval_seconds}s... (Ctrl+C para salir)")
        time.sleep(interval_seconds)

    mt5.shutdown()
    print(Fore.YELLOW + "🔌 MT5 desconectado.")


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  PUNTO DE ENTRADA
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(Fore.CYAN + Style.BRIGHT + """
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║     US30 Quantitative Analyzer v1.0  |  M5 Timeframe    ║
║     RSI · MACD · EMA · FVG · SMC · Delta · S/R          ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
""")
    # Cambiar loop=True para actualización continua cada 60 segundos
    run(loop=False, interval_seconds=60)
", "filename": "/mnt/user-data/outputs/us30_analyzer.py"}

Listo. Estos fueron los cambios aplicados:

---

## 🔧 Causa del error 4302
El EA buscaba `US30.cash` pero tu broker RoboForex usa `.US30Cash` (con punto al inicio y sin separador). El error `4302 = ERR_MARKET_UNKNOWN_SYMBOL`.

## ✅ Solución implementada

**Detección automática de símbolo en 3 niveles:**

```
1. Si InpSymbol está lleno  → usa ese valor
2. Si InpSymbol está vacío  → toma Symbol() del gráfico actual  ← por defecto
3. Si el símbolo no existe  → fallback automático a Symbol()
```

## 📋 Pasos para usar

1. Descarga y reemplaza en `MQL5/Experts/`
2. Compila con F7 en MetaEditor
3. Arrastra el EA al gráfico **`.US30Cash,M5`**
4. En los parámetros, **deja `InpSymbol` vacío** — tomará `.US30Cash` automáticamente
5. El Journal mostrará: `📌 Símbolo activo: .US30Cash`

{"language": "bash", "code": "cd /mnt/user-data/outputs

# Replace only the non-declaration occurrences of InpSymbol with gSymbol
sed -i '155s/InpSymbol/gSymbol/' US30_Analyzer.mq5
sed -i '158s/InpSymbol/gSymbol/' US30_Analyzer.mq5
sed -i '694s/InpSymbol/gSymbol/' US30_Analyzer.mq5

echo "Remaining InpSymbol lines:"
grep -n "InpSymbol" US30_Analyzer.mq5
"}

Listo. Estos fueron los cambios aplicados:

---

## 🔧 Causa del error 4302
El EA buscaba `US30.cash` pero tu broker RoboForex usa `.US30Cash` (con punto al inicio y sin separador). El error `4302 = ERR_MARKET_UNKNOWN_SYMBOL`.

## ✅ Solución implementada

**Detección automática de símbolo en 3 niveles:**

```
1. Si InpSymbol está lleno  → usa ese valor
2. Si InpSymbol está vacío  → toma Symbol() del gráfico actual  ← por defecto
3. Si el símbolo no existe  → fallback automático a Symbol()
```

## 📋 Pasos para usar

1. Descarga y reemplaza en `MQL5/Experts/`
2. Compila con F7 en MetaEditor
3. Arrastra el EA al gráfico **`.US30Cash,M5`**
4. En los parámetros, **deja `InpSymbol` vacío** — tomará `.US30Cash` automáticamente
5. El Journal mostrará: `📌 Símbolo activo: .US30Cash`

## 📊 Análisis del Reporte — .US30Cash | M5 | 06/03/2026 23:55

---

### 🎯 SEÑAL DEL EA: **VENTA** | Score: -5.0/10 | Confianza: 50%

---

### 📋 Resumen de los datos clave

| Indicador | Valor | Interpretación |
|---|---|---|
| **Precio** | 47,449.50 | — |
| **ATR(14)** | 61.69 pts | Volatilidad moderada |
| **EMA9** | 47,459.94 | Precio **BAJO** EMA9 ⚠️ |
| **EMA21** | 47,466.91 | Precio **BAJO** EMA21 ⚠️ |
| **EMA50** | 47,454.49 | Precio **BAJO** EMA50 ⚠️ |
| **EMA200** | 47,628.52 | Precio **BAJO** EMA200 🔴 |
| **RSI(14)** | 47.77 | NEUTRAL (zona media) |
| **MACD** | -0.387 | BAJISTA |
| **MACD Hist** | -9.66 | Momentum bajista fuerte |
| **Delta Vol** | +2.74% | NEUTRAL (equilibrado) |

---

### 🏗️ Estructura del mercado

**Resistencias sobre precio:**
- R1: 47,557.50 (+108 pts) ← más cercana
- R2: 48,077.50 (+628 pts)

**Soportes bajo precio:**
- S1: 47,230.50 (-219 pts) ← más cercano
- S2: 47,003.50 (-446 pts)

**Fair Value Gaps activos:**
- 🟢 Bullish FVG a **47,450.50** — ¡**precio está literalmente encima del FVG**! (dist. 1 pt)
- 🔴 Bearish FVG a 47,481.00 (+31 pts)
- 🔴 Bearish FVG a 47,472.50 (+23 pts)

---

### ⚡ DECISIÓN FINAL

> ⚠️ **NO OPERAR en este momento.** El EA da VENTA pero hay señales contradictorias importantes:

**Argumentos VENTA (a favor del EA):**
- Precio bajo TODAS las EMAs (9/21/50/200) → tendencia bajista clara
- MACD negativo con histograma en -9.66
- Precio muy cerca de la EMA200 bajando desde semanas arriba

**Argumentos EN CONTRA de operar ahora:**
- El precio está sobre un **Bullish FVG a solo 1 punto de distancia** → zona de rebote probable
- Delta volumen neutro (+2.74%) → sin presión vendedora real
- RSI en 47.77 → sin sobrecompra, no hay agotamiento confirmado
- Las últimas 20 velas son **50% alcistas / 50% bajistas** → mercado indeciso
- La R1 está solo a +108 pts, el TP del EA es +185 pts → puede no alcanzarlo

**Plan recomendado:**
1. **Esperar** que el precio rompa y cierre **por debajo de 47,420** (soporte intermedio) para confirmar continuación bajista
2. O esperar que el precio llegue a la **Bearish FVG en 47,472-47,481** para entrar con venta más limpia
3. Si entra en VENTA: TP en S1 = **47,230** (+219 pts) | SL sobre R1 = **47,560** (-110 pts) → R:R de 2:1 ✅

## 🏗️ Arquitectura del EA

### Estrategia: EMA Cross + MACD + FVG
*(seleccionada basándose en los datos del CSV)*

```
FILTRO 1 → Tendencia:  EMA9 > EMA21 > EMA50 (alcista) / inverso (bajista)
FILTRO 2 → Macro:      Precio sobre/bajo EMA200
FILTRO 3 → Momentum:   MACD Histograma en dirección + cruce de señal
FILTRO 4 → Entrada:    Precio cerca de FVG válido (ATR-dinámico)
FILTRO 5 → Confirmac.: Vela cerrada en dirección de la operación
```

### Gestión de trade (3 capas)
| Capa | Trigger | Acción |
|---|---|---|
| **Stop Loss** | Inmediato | ATR × 1.5 |
| **Break Even** | Al alcanzar 1R | SL → precio entrada |
| **Trailing Stop** | Tras BE activo | Sigue precio con ATR × 1.0 |

- `US30_EA_Trades.csv` — cada operación con P&L en tiempo real
- `US30_EA_Performance.csv` — reporte final con **Win Rate, PF, DD, Sharpe** vs objetivos

Ahora tengo el diagnóstico completo. Esto es exactamente lo que necesitamos para saber qué corregir:

---

## 🔬 Diagnóstico del Backtest — 602 trades | Ene 2025 → Mar 2026

---

### 🚨 El problema central es MUY específico

El EA no está roto en su lógica — está destruido por **2 factores concretos y corregibles**:

---

### 📌 PROBLEMA #1 — Las horas 13h-15h son un desastre

| Hora | P&L | Trades | Win Rate |
|------|-----|--------|----------|
| 08h | +$38 | 80 | 49% ✅ |
| 09h | **+$614** | 108 | 49% ✅ |
| 10h | +$168 | 109 | 51% ✅ |
| 11h | +$17 | 89 | 48% ✅ |
| 12h | **+$231** | 28 | 57% ✅ |
| **13h** | **-$903** | 33 | **31% 🔴** |
| **14h** | **-$1,465** | 35 | **31% 🔴** |
| **15h** | **-$839** | 44 | **43% 🔴** |
| 16h | +$807 | 44 | 52% ✅ |
| 17h | +$715 | 18 | **67% ✅** |

**Las 13h-15h generan -$3,207 solas.** Sin esas 112 operaciones, el EA es rentable. Es la apertura NY + overlap Londres que crea falsas señales por alta volatilidad y spreads amplios.

---

### 📌 PROBLEMA #2 — Los meses de tendencia lateral matan al EA

| Mes | P&L | WR | Causa |
|-----|-----|----|-------|
| Mar 2025 | **-$1,107** | 38% 🔴 | Mercado lateral |
| Sep 2025 | **-$1,191** | 39% 🔴 | Corrección lenta |
| Oct 2025 | **-$1,075** | 37% 🔴 | Rango sin tendencia |
| Dic 2025 | **-$850** | 43% 🔴 | Holiday chop |

El EA necesita un **filtro de volatilidad/tendencia macro** — si el US30 está en rango, no opera.

---

### 📌 PROBLEMA #3 — Ratio Win/Loss casi 1:1

- Avg WIN: **$103.16**
- Avg LOSS: **-$101.79**
- Ratio: **1.01** → Necesita ser **mínimo 1.5**

Con R:R configurado en 1.5/3.0 el trailing stop está devolviendo demasiadas ganancias. El TP se alcanza pero el trailing luego invierte.

---

### ✅ Plan de corrección — 3 cambios quirúrgicos

| Fix | Cambio en el EA | Impacto esperado |
|-----|-----------------|-----------------|
| **#1 Horario** | Bloquear 13:00–15:59 server time | +$3,207 recuperados |
| **#2 Filtro ADX** | Solo operar si ADX(14) > 25 (tendencia activa) | Elimina meses 37-38% WR |
| **#3 TP fijo** | Desactivar trailing antes de alcanzar TP, dejar TP fijo en ATR×3 | Sube ratio W/L a ~1.8 |

¿Arrancamos con la v2 del EA aplicando estos 3 fixes?

content.text: Tengo todos los datos. Voy a hacer un análisis profundo antes de responder.

input.command:
python3 << 'EOF'
import csv
from datetime import datetime

trades = []
with open('/mnt/user-data/uploads/US30_EA_Trades_Trades.csv', 'r', encoding='latin-1') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in reader:
        trades.append({
            'ticket': row['Ticket'],
            'tipo': row['Tipo'],
            'fecha': row['Apertura'],
            'close': float(row['Precio_Close']),
            'pnl': float(row['PnL_USD']),
            'resultado': row['Resultado'],
            'balance': float(row['Balance_Post'])
        })

# ── Métricas globales ──────────────────────────────────────
total = len(trades)
wins = [t for t in trades if t['resultado']=='WIN']
losses = [t for t in trades if t['resultado']=='LOSS']
wr = len(wins)/total*100
pf = sum(t['pnl'] for t in wins) / abs(sum(t['pnl'] for t in losses))

print(f"TOTAL TRADES: {total}")
print(f"WIN RATE: {wr:.1f}%")
print(f"PROFIT FACTOR: {pf:.3f}")
print(f"Avg WIN:  ${sum(t['pnl'] for t in wins)/len(wins):.2f}")
print(f"Avg LOSS: ${sum(t['pnl'] for t in losses)/len(losses):.2f}")
print(f"Ratio W/L: {(sum(t['pnl'] for t in wins)/len(wins)) / abs(sum(t['pnl'] for t in losses)/len(losses)):.2f}")

# ── Análisis por MES ───────────────────────────────────────
from collections import defaultdict
monthly = defaultdict(lambda: {'pnl':0,'w':0,'l':0,'n':0})
for t in trades:
    m = t['fecha'][:7]  # "2025.01"
    monthly[m]['pnl'] += t['pnl']
    monthly[m]['n'] += 1
    if t['resultado']=='WIN': monthly[m]['w'] += 1
    else: monthly[m]['l'] += 1

print("\n── RENDIMIENTO MENSUAL ──────────────────────────")
print(f"{'Mes':<10} {'P&L':>8} {'Trades':>7} {'WR%':>6} {'Balance':>10}")
bal = 10000
for m in sorted(monthly.keys()):
    d = monthly[m]
    bal += d['pnl']
    wr_m = d['w']/d['n']*100 if d['n']>0 else 0
    flag = "🔴" if d['pnl']<0 else "🟢"
    print(f"{m}  {flag} ${d['pnl']:>7.2f}  {d['n']:>5}  {wr_m:>5.1f}%  ${bal:>9.2f}")

# ── Drawdown ───────────────────────────────────────────────
peak = 10000
max_dd = 0
max_dd_start = ""
max_dd_end = ""
balance = 10000
for t in trades:
    balance += t['pnl']
    if balance > peak:
        peak = balance
    dd = (peak - balance) / peak * 100
    if dd > max_dd:
        max_dd = dd
        max_dd_end = t['fecha']

print(f"\nMax Drawdown: {max_dd:.2f}%")

# ── Rachas ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
max_win_streak = max_loss_streak = 0
cur_win = cur_loss = 0
for t in trades:
    if t['resultado']=='WIN':
        cur_win += 1; cur_loss = 0
    else:
        cur_loss += 1; cur_win = 0
    max_win_streak = max(max_win_streak, cur_win)
    max_loss_streak = max(max_loss_streak, cur_loss)

print(f"Max racha ganadora: {max_win_streak}")
print(f"Max racha perdedora: {max_loss_streak}")

# ── Análisis por TIPO (BUY vs SELL) ───────────────────────
buys = [t for t in trades if t['tipo']=='BUY']
sells = [t for t in trades if t['tipo']=='SELL']
buy_wr = len([t for t in buys if t['resultado']=='WIN'])/len(buys)*100
sell_wr = len([t for t in sells if t['resultado']=='WIN'])/len(sells)*100
buy_pnl = sum(t['pnl'] for t in buys)
sell_pnl = sum(t['pnl'] for t in sells)
print(f"\nBUY  → {len(buys)} trades | WR:{buy_wr:.1f}% | P&L: ${buy_pnl:.2f}")
print(f"SELL → {len(sells)} trades | WR:{sell_wr:.1f}% | P&L: ${sell_pnl:.2f}")

# ── Análisis por HORA ──────────────────────────────────────
hourly = defaultdict(lambda: {'pnl':0,'w':0,'n':0})
for t in trades:
    h = int(t['fecha'][11:13])
    hourly[h]['pnl'] += t['pnl']
    hourly[h]['n'] += 1
    if t['resultado']=='WIN': hourly[h]['w'] += 1

print("\n── RENDIMIENTO POR HORA ──")
for h in sorted(hourly.keys()):
    d = hourly[h]
    wr_h = d['w']/d['n']*100
    flag = "🟢" if d['pnl']>0 else "🔴"
    print(f"  {h:02d}h → {flag} P&L:${d['pnl']:>8.2f} | {d['n']:>3} trades | WR:{wr_h:.0f}%")

# ── Meses con pérdida consecutiva ────────────────────────
print("\n── MESES NEGATIVOS ──")
for m in sorted(monthly.keys()):
    if monthly[m]['pnl'] < 0:
        print(f"  {m}: ${monthly[m]['pnl']:.2f} ({monthly[m]['n']} trades, WR:{monthly[m]['w']/monthly[m]['n']*100:.1f}%)")
EOF

    monthly[m]['pnl'] += t['pnl']
    monthly[m]['n'] += 1
    if t['resultado']=='WIN': monthly[m]['w'] += 1
    else: monthly[m]['l'] += 1

print("\n── RENDIMIENTO MENSUAL ──────────────────────────")
print(f"{'Mes':<10} {'P&L':>8} {'Trades':>7} {'WR%':>6} {'Balance':>10}")
bal = 10000
for m in sorted(monthly.keys()):
    d = monthly[m]
    bal += d['pnl']
    wr_m = d['w']/d['n']*100 if d['n']>0 else 0
    flag = "🔴" if d['pnl']<0 else "🟢"
    print(f"{m}  {flag} ${d['pnl']:>7.2f}  {d['n']:>5}  {wr_m:>5.1f}%  ${bal:>9.2f}")

# ── Drawdown ───────────────────────────────────────────────
peak = 10000
max_dd = 0
max_dd_start = ""
max_dd_end = ""
balance = 10000
for t in trades:
    balance += t['pnl']
    if balance > peak:
        peak = balance
    dd = (peak - balance) / peak * 100
    if dd > max_dd:
        max_dd = dd
        max_dd_end = t['fecha']

print(f"\nMax Drawdown: {max_dd:.2f}%")

# ── Rachas ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
max_win_streak = max_loss_streak = 0
cur_win = cur_loss = 0
for t in trades:
    if t['resultado']=='WIN':
        cur_win += 1; cur_loss = 0
    else:
        cur_loss += 1; cur_win = 0
    max_win_streak = max(max_win_streak, cur_win)
    max_loss_streak = max(max_loss_streak, cur_loss)

print(f"Max racha ganadora: {max_win_streak}")
print(f"Max racha perdedora: {max_loss_streak}")

# ── Análisis por TIPO (BUY vs SELL) ───────────────────────
buys = [t for t in trades if t['tipo']=='BUY']
sells = [t for t in trades if t['tipo']=='SELL']
buy_wr = len([t for t in buys if t['resultado']=='WIN'])/len(buys)*100
sell_wr = len([t for t in sells if t['resultado']=='WIN'])/len(sells)*100
buy_pnl = sum(t['pnl'] for t in buys)
sell_pnl = sum(t['pnl'] for t in sells)
print(f"\nBUY  → {len(buys)} trades | WR:{buy_wr:.1f}% | P&L: ${buy_pnl:.2f}")
print(f"SELL → {len(sells)} trades | WR:{sell_wr:.1f}% | P&L: ${sell_pnl:.2f}")

# ── Análisis por HORA ──────────────────────────────────────
hourly = defaultdict(lambda: {'pnl':0,'w':0,'n':0})
for t in trades:
    h = int(t['fecha'][11:13])
    hourly[h]['pnl'] += t['pnl']
    hourly[h]['n'] += 1
    if t['resultado']=='WIN': hourly[h]['w'] += 1

print("\n── RENDIMIENTO POR HORA ──")
for h in sorted(hourly.keys()):
    d = hourly[h]
    wr_h = d['w']/d['n']*100
    flag = "🟢" if d['pnl']>0 else "🔴"
    print(f"  {h:02d}h → {flag} P&L:${d['pnl']:>8.2f} | {d['n']:>3} trades | WR:{wr_h:.0f}%")

# ── Meses con pérdida consecutiva ────────────────────────
print("\n── MESES NEGATIVOS ──")
for m in sorted(monthly.keys()):
    if monthly[m]['pnl'] < 0:
        print(f"  {m}: ${monthly[m]['pnl']:.2f} ({monthly[m]['n']} trades, WR:{monthly[m]['w']/monthly[m]['n']*100:.1f}%)")
EOF"}

content.text:
Ahora tengo el diagnóstico completo. Esto es exactamente lo que necesitamos para saber qué corregir:

---

## 🔬 Diagnóstico del Backtest — 602 trades | Ene 2025 → Mar 2026

---

### 🚨 El problema central es MUY específico

El EA no está roto en su lógica — está destruido por **2 factores concretos y corregibles**:

---

### 📌 PROBLEMA #1 — Las horas 13h-15h son un desastre

| Hora | P&L | Trades | Win Rate |
|------|-----|--------|----------|
| 08h | +$38 | 80 | 49% ✅ |
| 09h | **+$614** | 108 | 49% ✅ |
| 10h | +$168 | 109 | 51% ✅ |
| 11h | +$17 | 89 | 48% ✅ |
| 12h | **+$231** | 28 | 57% ✅ |
| **13h** | **-$903** | 33 | **31% 🔴** |
| **14h** | **-$1,465** | 35 | **31% 🔴** |
| **15h** | **-$839** | 44 | **43% 🔴** |
| 16h | +$807 | 44 | 52% ✅ |
| 17h | +$715 | 18 | **67% ✅** |

**Las 13h-15h generan -$3,207 solas.** Sin esas 112 operaciones, el EA es rentable. Es la apertura NY + overlap Londres que crea falsas señales por alta volatilidad y spreads amplios.

---

### 📌 PROBLEMA #2 — Los meses de tendencia lateral matan al EA

| Mes | P&L | WR | Causa |
|-----|-----|----|-------|
| Mar 2025 | **-$1,107** | 38% 🔴 | Mercado lateral |
| Sep 2025 | **-$1,191** | 39% 🔴 | Corrección lenta |
| Oct 2025 | **-$1,075** | 37% 🔴 | Rango sin tendencia |
| Dic 2025 | **-$850** | 43% 🔴 | Holiday chop |

El EA necesita un **filtro de volatilidad/tendencia macro** — si el US30 está en rango, no opera.

---

### 📌 PROBLEMA #3 — Ratio Win/Loss casi 1:1

- Avg WIN: **$103.16**
- Avg LOSS: **-$101.79**
- Ratio: **1.01** → Necesita ser **mínimo 1.5**

Con R:R configurado en 1.5/3.0 el trailing stop está devolviendo demasiadas ganancias. El TP se alcanza pero el trailing luego invierte.

---

### ✅ Plan de corrección — 3 cambios quirúrgicos

| Fix | Cambio en el EA | Impacto esperado |
|-----|-----------------|-----------------|
| **#1 Horario** | Bloquear 13:00–15:59 server time | +$3,207 recuperados |
| **#2 Filtro ADX** | Solo operar si ADX(14) > 25 (tendencia activa) | Elimina meses 37-38% WR |
| **#3 TP fijo** | Desactivar trailing antes de alcanzar TP, dejar TP fijo en ATR×3 | Sube ratio W/L a ~1.8 |

¿Arrancamos con la v2 del EA aplicando estos 3 fixes?

## ✅ US30_EA_v2.mq5 listo — aquí está el resumen de lo que cambió

### 🔧 3 Fixes quirúrgicos implementados

**FIX #1 — Zona muerta bloqueada** (13:00–15:59)
- `InpNYStart` cambió de `13` → `16`
- El gap entre `LondonEnd=12` y `NYStart=16` bloquea automáticamente las 3 horas que causaban **-$3,207**
- London: 08–12h | NY: 16–20h | Zona muerta: **silencio total**

**FIX #2 — Filtro ADX(14) > 25**
- Nuevo handle `hADX` + buffers `bADX`, `bDIPlus`, `bDIMinus`
- Señal requiere **ADX > 25** (tendencia real) Y que **+DI/-DI** apunte en la dirección correcta
- Contador `gADXFiltered` registra cuántas señales bloqueó en el CSV final

**FIX #3 — Trailing SOLO tras alcanzar TP original**
- Flag `gTPReached` + variable `gTradeTP` (guarda el TP original)
- El trailing **no se activa hasta que el precio toque el TP** → captura movimientos grandes
- Una vez activado: trailing de `ATR × 1.5` sin límite superior

### 📁 CSV mejorado
- Nueva columna `Sesion` (LON/NY) y `ADX` por operación
- Columna `TPAlcanzado` (SI/NO) para analizar el FIX #3
- Performance final con comparativa **v1 vs v2**

## 📊 Análisis de Sesiones — US30 EA v2

### 🏆 Veredicto rápido

**Estrategia v2 es rentable:** +$4,393 (+44% en 14 meses) vs v1 que perdió -$408. Los 3 fixes funcionaron.

---

### 🕐 ¿Qué sesión es más rentable?

| Sesión | Trades | WR | P&L Total | PF | Avg WIN | Avg LOSS | Ratio |
|--------|--------|----|-----------|----|---------|----------|-------|
| **NY (16–20h)** 🏆 | 213 | **29.6%** | **+$2,987** | **1.26** | $232 | -$78 | **2.99x** |
| **Londres (08–12h)** | 352 | 27.3% | +$1,531 | 1.07 | $229 | -$80 | 2.87x |

**NY gana**, pero hay un matiz muy importante al ver por hora:

---

### ⏰ Las horas que realmente importan

| Hora | Sesión | P&L | Trades | WR |
|------|--------|-----|--------|-----|
| 08h | LON | **-$76** 🔴 | 85 | 27% |
| **09h** | LON | **+$351** ✅ | 101 | 27% |
| **10h** | LON | **+$319** ✅ | 103 | 28% |
| **11h** | LON | **+$938** ✅ | 63 | 27% |
| 16h | NY | +$311 ✅ | 94 | 31% |
| **17h** | NY | **+$1,845** ✅ | 78 | 30% |
| **18h** | NY | **+$1,231** ✅ | 23 | **35%** |
| 19h | NY | **-$401** 🔴 | 18 | 17% |

---

### 🎯 Conclusiones accionables para v3

**1. Recortar Londres:** La hora `08h` destruye -$76 con ADX altísimo (39.6) → el mercado aún no tiene dirección clara en la apertura europea. Cambia `LondonStart` de `8` → `9`.

**2. Recortar NY tarde:** La hora `19h` es un desastre (-$401, WR 17%). Cambia `NYEnd` de `20` → `19`.

**3. La hora 11h de Londres es oro:** Solo 63 trades pero +$938 — es el cierre de Londres con tendencia ya formada.

**4. ADX ≥ 35 es aún mejor:** Con ADX≥35 el WR sube a **30.3%** pero con P&L de $3,931 en solo 244 trades (ratio W/L ~3x). Vale la pena subir `InpADXMin` de 25 → 35.

**5. TP nunca se alcanzó** (columna `TPAlcanzado = 0/566`): el FIX #3 del trailing nunca se activó — el mercado cierra casi siempre por SL o BE. Hay que revisar si el TP en `ATR×3` es demasiado ambicioso o el broker lo cierra antes.

---
